name: Elio Table Lamp - 23.5 Inch Height - TBL4586 - White - Safavieh
description:
Introduce a touch of elegance to your home with the ELIO TABLE LAMP. Crafted with a sleek ceramic body and complemented by a sophisticated fabric shade, this table lamp is a testament to tasteful design. Its clean white color scheme ensures it will blend seamlessly with a variety of decor styles, providing a soft, inviting glow wherever it's placed.

With its dimensions measuring 23.5 inches in height and a shade width of 14 inches, this lamp is perfectly sized for a variety of settings, from end tables to office desks. The 60-inch cord length offers ample reach for convenient placement. Reinvent your space with the ELIO TABLE LAMP, a stylish and practical lighting solution.
